channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: You don't understand a system until you've rebuilt it
item.description: "Build your own X to understand it" is advice so common it has stopped meaning anything. I repeated it for years without being able to say why it worked, which is the same as not understanding it....

item.title: AI Can Write Code Faster Than I Can Responsibly Review It
item.description: I use Claude Code almost every day while building Zenovay. It can scaffold a feature, trace a bug across several files, write tests, refactor an old module, and explain an unfamiliar part of the...

item.title: I built a schemaless intake for my CRM. It silently dropped files three times.
item.description: I dropped a file into my own intake folder, ran the sync, and watched it finish clean. No error. No warning. The file was never there again — not in the index, not in any downstream output, not...

item.title: I asked Reddit what they wanted in a C++ application framework and their answers were...
item.description: In short their answers were useful and highly aligned, not just with with my thinking but with one another. There wasn't consensus, this is the internet, but there were was remarkable consistency....

item.title: 🚀 Backend Internals #2: What Actually Happens When You Call `require()`?
item.description: In my previous post, we learned that Node.js caches modules, so the same file isn't executed twice. But have you ever wondered what actually happens the first time you call require()? Let's break...

item.title: How AI is Transforming Software Development Workflows in 2026
item.description: How AI is Transforming Software Development Workflows in 2026 The software development landscape has undergone a seismic shift. What was once the realm of experimental sidekicks has matured into a...

item.title: Scaling Vibe Coding: Why 10 Developers Need One Scanner
item.description: Ten developers using AI assistants don't produce one coherent codebase. They produce ten coding styles, ten prompt strategies, and ten different vulnerability surfaces — then merge them into one...

item.title: GitGrit - The Open Source Engineering Standards Platform Built From a Decade of Pain Points as an Engineer
item.description: In this article I'm going to present you with something I've been working on personally for almost two years now (on and off), and it's a topic close to my heart. GitGrit - my open source, MIT...

item.title: Scaling AI Applications Without Breaking the Bank
item.description: Scaling AI Applications Without Breaking the Bank In the race to deploy AI at scale, many teams hit a wall: costs. Cloud bills spiral, model inference becomes prohibitively expensive, and data...

item.title: SQLAlchemy ORM Security: The Raw Query Escape Hatch
item.description: SQLAlchemy's ORM is one of the better defenses against SQL injection available to Python developers. Normal ORM calls — filter(), filter_by(), query() — compile to parameterized queries. The...

item.title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
item.description: Following the MacBook Neo's huge popularity so far, Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget laptop with a new processor and more memory, and even has plans to refresh the...

item.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
item.description: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life....

item.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
item.description: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

item.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
item.description: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

item.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
item.description: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

item.title: How the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 phones compare
item.description: Samsung's latest round of folding Galaxy Z phones and updated smartwatches were announced at its July 2026 Unpacked event and are set to launch on August 7th. The Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold...

item.title: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
item.description: Samsung's newest foldables are here. At Galaxy Unpacked, the company announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. All three devices will be available on August 7th,...

item.title: Philips’ new smart toothbrush shows you where you didn’t properly brush
item.description: The latest addition to Philips' Sonicare line of smart electric toothbrushes could take the guesswork out of your brushing routine. The Next-Generation DiamondClean 9900 Prestige uses a...

item.title: Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC
item.description: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility efforts today by bringing original Xbox games to PC. An early preview release will see four classic Xbox games available on PC today, as part...

item.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
item.description: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership,...

item.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
item.description: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

item.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
item.description: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

item.title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
item.description: Gentle Monster glasses, Warby Parker glasses, a prompt asking for the history behind a pictured building, and a prompt asking to book a table at a pictured restaurant

item.title: Samsung’s newest foldable finally feels Ultra
item.description: While we wait for Apple's rumored foldable iPhone, Samsung is polishing a design it already has on the market. I just spent three hours with my hands on the new Z Fold 8 Ultra, and all I can think...

item.title: Samsung’s wider Z Fold 8 feels just right
item.description: A year after overhauling its Z Fold phone with a radically thinner design, Samsung has changed things up again, this time altering the shape entirely. The Z Fold 8 is wider than any of Samsung's...

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 bet big on battery
item.description: It's a year of refinement for the Galaxy Watch. With the new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, which are being announced today, Samsung is more or less taking what people like about its...

item.title: Hackers Exploit Windmill Flaw to Read Arbitrary Server Files Without Authentication
item.description: A high-severity security flaw impacting open-source developer platform Windmill has come under active exploitation in the wild, per VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-29059 (CVSS...

item.title: The Download: NASA’s new space telescope and OpenAI’s autonomous hacker
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Shape-shifting mirrors on NASA’s new space telescope could...

item.title: Advancing the next era of national science
item.description: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
